creator: mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
text:
This port now uses ${PREFIX} and ${CFLAGS}.
passes portlint with 0 errors and 0 warnings

The new files are below the diffs in a uuencoded tarfile which contains
the following:
	patches/patch-ab
	patches/patch-ac
	patches/patch-ad
	patches/patch-ae
	files/tgdcommand.h
	files/tgdgd.h
